description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run Tests that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main. The workflow has two jobs: lint and build. The lint job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.10, and runs the pre-commit action. The build job runs on ubuntu-latest, depends on lint, and uses a matrix strategy to test with Python 3.10, 3.11, 3.12, and 3.13. For each Python version, it checks out the repository, sets up Python, installs dependencies with pip, and runs tests with scripts/test.
